message:
refactor(freeze): split zig_runtime.zig into modular components

Split the 2956-line zig_runtime.zig into focused modules for better
maintainability:

- js_types.zig: Core types (JSContext, JSRuntime, tag constants)
- js_value.zig: JSValue, CompressedValue, JSVarRef, quickjs FFI
- js_ops.zig: Arithmetic, comparison, and bitwise operations
- frozen_helpers.zig: Stack management, closures, iterators, atoms
- fast_array.zig: TypedArray and fast array optimizations
- string_pool.zig: String interning

zig_runtime.zig now re-exports all modules, maintaining full backwards
compatibility for existing code.
